purpose: Manual review overrides for unresolved Reep person ID mappings.
rules: Only add an entry after checking DOB, club, nationality, official roster context, or a trusted provider ID.
Each entry must include platform_person_id, provider_refs.reep_id, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, and evidence.
Manual patch entries only resolve ID mapping; they must not change official roster facts.

evidence: Platform official FIFA roster row has position GK.
Selected Reep candidate is the only goalkeeper among same-name candidates and is a modern active player born 2002-03-07.
Other candidates are defender/forward/unknown or implausible for the current goalkeeper slot.
